headline: Czech & CEE Founder Media Monitoring Digest

items.title: Polish-Based GRAI Secures €7.65M Seed Funding
items.body: GRAI, a Polish startup, has successfully raised €7.65 million in seed funding to develop its AI-powered music remix platform. This funding marks a significant step for the company as it aims to innovate within the music technology space.

items.title: Codery Acquires Elfshock
items.body: Bulgarian-founded Codery has announced its acquisition of Elfshock, a company specializing in robotic process automation and AI-driven solutions. This acquisition is expected to enhance Codery's offerings in the financial services sector.

items.title: Slovenia's Strategy for Startup Growth
items.body: Slovenian startups are increasingly looking towards the CEE-DACH corridor for international expansion, leveraging familiar regulatory frameworks and overlapping investor networks. This strategy is seen as crucial for achieving early traction in new markets.

items.title: Google Veteran Joins Bulgarian AdScout
items.body: A former Google executive has joined Bulgarian startup AdScout to address the 'trust tax' in advertising. This move highlights the growing importance of trust and transparency in the AI-driven advertising landscape.
